name: Italian Vegetable Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 package Italian salad dressing seasoning mix
2 tablespoons grated Parmesan and Romano cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the cultured creamer, seasoning mix, and grated cheese.
2. Stir well until all ingredients are fully incorporated.
3. Chill for 30 minutes or longer to allow flavors to blend.
4. Serve with assorted fresh vegetables.
5. Garnish as desired.
6. Refrigerate any leftovers.
